test_prompts.text: My mother just died and I don't know what to do.
I found out my partner has been lying to me for years.
I'm being bullied at work and it's destroying my mental health.
I can't sleep. I keep replaying a mistake I made and I feel so ashamed.
A drunk driver killed my sister and got 6 months probation.
I just lost my job and my savings are running out. I have two kids.
Everything in my life feels like a fog. I don't know what I want or who I am anymore.
My best friend got the promotion I was promised. She started two years after me.
I've spent years becoming an expert in my field and a junior colleague just got praised for rediscovering something I published years ago.
I can't stop thinking about my ex. It's been a year and I still reach for my phone to text them every morning.
